summary: Phase 5 testing complete. All major features working: Admin Dashboard with Analytics/My Report/Executive Reports/Settings tabs, Customer validation (phone normalization, GST format, email), Address Directory CRUD, Order creation with addresses and mode of payment, Math.ceil rounding, Dispatch lock, PI Builder with customer creation and PDF download, All Orders executive filter. Fixed PI PDF endpoint to accept token query parameter for new-tab access.

minor.issue: Fixed - was using Depends(get_current_user) instead of token query param, preventing PDF download in new tab

integration_issues.issue: Order not found error shows briefly when navigating from All Orders to Order Detail - likely a routing/state issue

issues: React warning: Each child in a list should have a unique key prop in TableBody

action_items: Investigate Order Detail page 'Order not found' error when navigating from All Orders list
Fix React key prop warning in Customers page TableBody component
critical_code_review_comments: PI PDF endpoint was missing token query param support - fixed during testing
Console shows 404 errors for some resources - may need investigation
seed_data_creation: Created test customers and addresses during backend testing, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5 features fully implemented and tested. Key features: Admin Dashboard with 5 tabs (Analytics, My Report, Executive Reports, Users, Settings), Customer validation (phone +91 normalization, GST 15-char format, email format), Address Directory per customer with CRUD and pincode auto-fill, Order/PI creation with billing/shipping addresses and 'Same as Billing' checkbox, Mode of Payment dropdown, Math.ceil rounding for grand total, Dispatch lock (no edit after dispatch except payment/formulation), PI PDF with bank details and UPI QR code. Mocked APIs: GST verification, Pincode lookup has local fallback.

admin_dashboard.analytics_tab: Working - shows total orders, revenue, product sales, status breakdown, executive performance
admin_dashboard.my_report_tab: Working - shows admin's own performance with date filters
admin_dashboard.executive_reports_tab: Working - has executive selection dropdown with date filters
admin_dashboard.settings_tab: Working - formulation visibility toggle and packaging staff management

customer_validation.phone_mandatory: Working - at least one phone required

order_enhancements.item_description: Working - optional description field per item
order_enhancements.rounding: Working - Math.ceil applied to grand total

dispatch_lock.allows_payment: Working - payment status can be updated

pi_builder.customer_creation: Working - New button in PI form
pi_builder.address_selection: Working - billing/shipping with same as billing
pi_builder.rounding: Working - Grand Total (Rounded Up) label shown
pi_builder.pdf_download: Working - PDF with bank details and UPI QR code

all_orders.executive_filter: Working - admin can filter by executive

mocked_apis.gst_verification: /api/gst-verify/{gst_no} - returns state name based on first 2 digits
mocked_apis.pincode_lookup: External API with local fallback mapping for common pincodes
